$comment: Method registry — analyzer picks ONE method.id per scene from `methods` list. `wipMethods` are catalog'd but their renderer isn't built yet — DO NOT pick. Reliability: S=skill-backed, A=third-party skill, B=no skill.

methods.label: GSAP Kinetic Text
methods.whenToUse: Short title, hero phrase, emphasis word, or kinetic typography. Best for 1–8 word lines.

methods.label: Plain CSS Fade Caption
methods.whenToUse: Universal fallback. Use when no stronger method fits — text just needs to appear. Always safe.

methods.label: Anime.js Word Scatter Reveal
methods.whenToUse: Lists of 3–7 items, comma-delimited enumerations, or text where words should fly in one by one with stagger.

methods.label: WAAPI Highlight Marker Sweep
methods.whenToUse: When a single phrase or word inside a longer line needs to be highlighted with a marker sweep / underline / circle.

methods.label: D3 Bar Chart (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: Comparing 3–10 numerical values (rankings, scores, PPG, revenue per period). One categorical axis + one numerical axis.

methods.label: D3 Line / Trend Chart (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: Showing change over time. Continuous data on a temporal x-axis.

methods.label: Framer Motion Card Stack (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: When the line introduces 2–5 named things to compare (products, libraries, options). Each becomes a Framer Motion card that springs into place.

methods.label: Lottie Animation Play
methods.whenToUse: When a .lottie/.json animation asset exists and the line invites watching it (logo reveal, icon explanation, animated illustration).

methods.label: Image Ken Burns Pan/Zoom (Remotion)
methods.whenToUse: When the line narrates over a single image and wants a cinematic slow pan/zoom feel (Ken Burns).

methods.label: Raw Video Clip (Remotion passthrough)
methods.whenToUse: When the asset pool has a B-roll/clip whose duration matches the scene. Just plays it back with light grade.

methods.label: Tailwind Tile / Pricing-Card
methods.whenToUse: When the line introduces a single product/feature in a tile-style frame. Cheap and clean.

methods.label: Chapter Title Card
methods.whenToUse: Chapter/section divider card (小Lin说 dark/gold). scene.text='第六章|多米诺骨牌|Dominoes|97-99' (chapNo|titleCN|titleEN|years).

methods.label: Stat Counter (count-up)
methods.whenToUse: Big single-number / statistic callout with count-up animation. scene.text='300|%|香港隔夜拆借利率|1997.10' (value|suffix|label|sublabel; value may carry $/¥ prefix; non-numeric shown literally).

wipMethods.label: Three.js Layered Poster Camera Orbit
wipMethods.whenToUse: When there is a layered image asset (poster/PSD-style) and the line narrates spatial/structural analysis of it. Camera orbits in 3D.

wipMethods.label: Framer Motion Comparison Table (Remotion)
wipMethods.whenToUse: Long comparison tables (10+ rows, 3+ columns). Rows fade in staggered, current row highlights.

wipMethods.label: Rive State-Machine Animation (Remotion)
wipMethods.whenToUse: When the narration describes interaction/state-changes and a .riv file exists in assets/. Best for UI demos, character animations, micro-interactions.

wipMethods.label: Fabric.js Canvas Drawing (Remotion)
wipMethods.whenToUse: Free-form diagrams: arrows, circles, callouts drawn programmatically. When no static image fits but you need a shape-based illustration.
